seed: 100 Gooaye episodes (avg ~45 min) scraped via RSS → Deepgram → Gemini, batch-size 3, Gemini key pool of 3 keys

top10_for_baseline.title: F-01 + F-03 compound — RSS 429 with no retry = episode drop
SoundOn RSS rate-limit at burst of 3 identical GETs
Gemini cooldownQueue serializes all parallel calls
Gemini key-pool all-429 = 155s backoff cycle, repeatable
Per-minute quota reset vs 5s backoff mismatch
F-02 + F-04 compound — cooldown serializes 429 cascade
100 eps × 300 RSS fetches exceed SoundOn unwritten daily limit
Audio buffer heap pressure at batch-size 10
SIGINT recovery preserves DB row integrity but miscounts
Signed enclosure URL expires between discovery and download — injection candidate

injection_candidates.injection: Doctored feed locally — wrap fetch() with a MSW/nock intercept that returns 429 on every 3rd call to feeds.soundon.fm to simulate SoundOn rate-limit.
injection_candidates.cost: zero — no real API spend; failure is observed in pipeline logs.
injection_candidates.expected_behavior: Current code throws ExtractorError('FETCH_FAILED') with no retry. After F-03 fix is applied (future change), retries should absorb the 429.
injection_candidates.verification: Run --limit 3 locally with the intercept. Expect 0 errors after F-03 fix, ≥2 errors without.

injection_candidates.injection: SIGINT mid-batch probe — start --limit 5, wait for first episode to complete transcription, send SIGINT, then re-run --limit 5.
injection_candidates.expected_behavior: First run's 1 imported post survives. Restart completes remaining 4 without creating dup post. `duplicate` counter on restart = 1, `importedCount` cumulative across DB = 5.
injection_candidates.verification: Query `SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE source='seed' AND kol_id=<gooaye_id>` before/after. Δ = 5.
